summary: Tested Personal Intelligence & Campaign Config features. All 19 backend tests passed. Fixed critical frontend bug: PersonalIntelSection component was using undefined 'contactId' variable. Personal Intelligence section now displays correctly with spouse, kids, interests, vehicle, etc. Campaign Config page renders with all sections.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED: contactId was undefined, changed to 'id as string' from useLocalSearchParams()

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Personal Intelligence section and Campaign Config page working)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing Bud contact with personal_details populated from voice memo test

Campaign config endpoints all working with hierarchy resolution.
